response.justification: The candidate is an experienced senior generalist with 15+ years across web, mobile, and some embedded work, but does not match this specialized embedded-firmware security role. The position has hard requirements that are not met: native-level Japanese proficiency is entirely absent (languages listed are English, Romanian, German-basic), C proficiency for UNIX development is minimal (only a brief C/C++ stint at National Instruments and a thesis project; C is not even in the skills list), and there is no demonstrated Linux kernel source modification, security (MACsec/802.1X/encryption), or L2/L3 switch/networking experience. The skill set is heavily weighted toward TypeScript/Node.js, DLang, and web platforms.
strengths: 15+ years of software engineering with strong delivery track record
Solid engineering discipline (TDD, CI/CD, testing, trunk-based development)
Some low-level/embedded exposure (robotic arms, C/C++ at NI, C++ sound thesis)
concerns: Native-level Japanese required and not present — hard disqualifier
Weak C/UNIX depth; no security, networking (L2/L3, switch), or kernel-mod experience
Profile centers on web/full-stack (TS, DLang), not embedded firmware

key_factors.factor: Limited C/UNIX and Linux kernel depth
